rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>ふぅ… <Ruby={2:4}いき>息が<Ruby={2:2}あ>上がっちゃったわね…<unk[5:0]>
キノコのことを<Ruby={2:6}かんが>考えていて <Ruby={4:6}ゆだん>油断しちゃったの
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>Phew, I'm breathless. I was thinking about
mushrooms instead of paying attention...

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>Ow... That's what I get for thinking
about mushrooms.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]><Ruby={2:6}ちから>力いっぱい<Ruby={2:4}なぐ>殴ってくるなんて！
アイツらめー！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>I didn't think they'd come after me like
that! Ooh, they really steam me up!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>キノコ<Ruby={2:4}さが>探しに <Ruby={2:4}よく>欲を<Ruby={2:2}だ>出し<Ruby={2:2}す>過ぎて
<Ruby={2:4}あぶ>危ないところだったわ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Oops... I was thinking too much about
mushrooms and not enough about
avoiding danger.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[5:1]><unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>……我还以为自己活不成了，
脑海中甚至浮现出玫古的脸了……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[5:1]><unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>我還以為真的要完蛋了……
腦海中還浮現了玫古的臉……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>…<Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当に もうダメだと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思ったわ<unk[5:1]>
メグの<Ruby={2:4}かお>顔がよぎったし…
rows.USen:
<unk[5:1]><unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>I really thought that was the end for me!
All I could think about what seeing
Meghyn one last time...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>光凭我自己，刚刚肯定要束手就擒了。
我还是第一次陷入这么危险的境况……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:6}わたし>私の<Ruby={2:6}ちから>力では どうすることもできなかったわ
ここまで<Ruby={2:4}あぶ>危なかったのは <Ruby={2:4}はじ>初めてよ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>I've never been in trouble like that before!
These muscles were made for mushroom
picking, not monster fighting.

<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:28 85 110 99 111 110 115 99 105 111 117 115 95 48 49]>All I wanted...was a few mushrooms...
How did this happen?

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>うぅ…<unk[5:1]> アイツら <Ruby={6:12}とつぜんおそ>突然襲ってくるなんて…<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={8:12}むちゃくちゃ>無茶苦茶よ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>That came...<unk[5:1]>out of nowhere...<unk[5:1]> Can't
believe it...

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 83 99 97 114 101 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:4}むり>無理よ…<unk[5:1]> <Ruby={2:6}わたし>私には<Ruby={2:4}なに>何もできない…<unk[5:1]>
もう キノコ<Ruby={2:4}さが>探しできないのかなぁ…<unk[5:1]> メグ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 83 99 97 114 101 95 48 49]>This is the end!<unk[5:1]> No more mushrooms...<unk[5:1]>
No more Meghyn...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>总之，非常感谢你出手相救！
感激不尽！
请一定要收下这个！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>總之真的謝謝你救了我！
我對你感激不盡！
請務必收下這個！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>でも <Ruby={2:4}たす>助けてくれて <Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当にありがとう！
キミには <Ruby={4:8}かんしゃ>感謝してるわ！
ぜひ これを<Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取って！
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Oh, here! Thank you for your help!

rows.JPja: イチカラ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村の<Ruby={2:4}みせ>店だよね？
